items.comment: See how messy this display is due to layering and overlapping white boxes and the arrow location (should be up to the start of the icon)
checks: Graph labels and label backgrounds must not obscure the primary selected node.
Repeated relationship stacks must collapse into readable count-bearing nodes or rows.
Arrowheads must terminate at the visual boundary of the target icon rather than running through the icon centre.
Relationship labels must remain readable without overlapping unrelated node labels.
The relationship drawer must support inspection without covering the main graph target.
